Class Category

java.lang.Object
ShopSystem.Category
All Implemented Interfaces:
Comparable<Category>, Payable
Direct Known Subclasses:
Electronic, GardenItem, Product
public abstract class Category extends Object implements Comparable<Category>, Payable
